mapper.update:
update student
name=#{name}, no= #{no}, phone= #{phone}, gender= #{gender}, degree= #{degree}, clazz_id= #{clazzId}, id_card= #{idCard}, is_college= #{isCollege}, address= #{address}, graduation_date= #{graduationDate}, update_time= #{updateTime}, violation_count=#{violationCount}, violation_score=#{violationScore} where id= #{id};
update student set violation_count=violation_count+1, violation_score=violation_score+10 where id=#{id};
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select (case when clazz_id=1 then (select name from clazz where id=1) when clazz_id=2 then (select name from clazz where id=2) when clazz_id=3 then (select name from clazz where id=3) when clazz_id=4 then (select name from clazz where id=4) when clazz_id=5 then (select name from clazz where id=5) when clazz_id=6 then (select name from clazz where id=6) else '其他'end ) name, count(*) value from student group by clazz_id order by value;

select (case degree when 1 then '初中' when 2 then '高中' when 3 then '大专' when 4 then '本科' when 5 then '硕士' when 6 then '博士' else '其他'end ) degree, count(*) value from student group by degree order by value;
